name: Spaghetti Squash and Avocado Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup avocado oil or light vegetable oil
1 can (4 ounces) sliced black olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Avocado Oil Vinaigrette at least 24 hours before serving.
2. Shake all ingredients for the avocado vinaigrette together in a tightly covered container.
3. Let Vinaigrette stand at least 24 hours.
4. Halve the spaghetti squash lengthwise and scoop out seeds.
5. Place halves cut side down in a large saucepan; add water to a depth of two inches; cover and bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat; simmer squash for 20 minutes.
7. Drain off water; cool squash and shred into strands.
8. Mix shredded squash, sliced mushrooms, julienned peppers, black olives, and sliced avocados in a serving bowl.
9. Pour Vinaigrette over salad and toss gently before serving.
